text:
(King Angelael Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Designers Note p.254 ) is an Angel appearing in episode 31 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion THE ANIMATION.

Profile

Kingshitoel is an Angel that uses elements of various Angels of the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. The tail and lower body is based on the Third Angel; it has the torso and arms of Tenth Angel and the head is similar to Fifth Angel head with Fourth Angel mask on top. The Angel has a small violet octahedron similar in shape to Sixth Angel hovering above it and the "wings" on its back are based on Eighth Angel. 

Kingshitoel appears to mostly attack with slashes from its arms and by firing cross shaped energy beams from the floating jewel above its head. The jewel is also shown generating an A.T Field. Beyond basic attacks and its A.T. Field, it is unclear what other abilities it has, if any.

History

Shinkalion The Animation

After having its A.T. Field destroyed by Shinji Ikari piloting the Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA, Kingshitoel is defeated by Hayato Hayasugi piloting the Shinkalion E5 Hayabusa.

Trivia

The name is most likely a portmanteau of the English word "King" and the Japanese term for Angels, "Shito" and the suffix "El", which was used to name Angels in Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series.
